svg.title: Operation 02 - deep clearance 205 x 142 mm - cut depth 12 mm
svg.desc: Second milling operation. Full-width 205 x 142 mm deep clearance with R4 corners. Use an 8 mm cutter. Cut depth: 12 mm from the top face. Leaves 60 mm resting area at top and 3 mm resting area at bottom from operation 01.
